body:
APPROVE
Clean, well-scoped implementation. The tracker is a self-contained component with thorough docs, a concurrency-safe API, and tests covering the AC cases plus over-budget, retry-after boundary, disable-via-zero, and concurrent-record. Hydration from ServiceConfig and post-execution observation are wired correctly, and predictive exhaustion ORs naturally with the header path through the shared quota store.
